name: Martial World / JINMU
description:
So… you just wanted to play some VR, right? But oops — your headset exploded. Your brain? Mostly porridge now. 🍳

Lucky you! Somehow, you got sent to a Murim world! And guess what? You’ve got a system… well, only an informative one, but hey, better than nothing, right?!

Good luck not getting flattened by some random stranger out there. Oh, the dying part? Nah… don’t worry too much. Just focus on one thing:

Get stronger. Survive. Explore. Learn new arts. And maybe, just maybe, come out alive(or not 😋) .

Welcome to Jinmu — the land of martial arts, sects, clans, and absolutely zero mercy. 🥸(yeah, your pretty much fucked up)

The Four Kingdoms of Jinmu

Goryang Empire (고량국) – The land of golden dragons and imperial authority. Home to the Shaolin Temple, Wudang Sect, and noble clans like Namgung and Jegal. A place of honor, politics, and bustling trade.

Baekho Kingdom (백호국) – A snowy northern realm, guarded by the White Tiger lineage. Renowned for cavalry, ice techniques, and mystical sects such as the Shaman Sect.

Hwayang Kingdom (화양국) – A radiant, artistic land of rivers and blossoms. Emei and Kunlun sects flourish here, alongside merchant clans and martial families.

Heukryeong Dominion (흑룡국) – Dark and dangerous, ruled by the Blood Dragon lineage. Unorthodox and demonic sects dominate here, including the Blood Cult, Ghost Sect, and Five Poisons Cult.

Some organizations, like the Murim Alliance, Merchant Guilds, and the Open Clan (Beggars’ Sect), operate across all kingdoms.

🥋 Martial Arts & Sects

Every sect and clan in Jinmu has unique martial arts techniques, categorized as:

  • Orthodox/Righteous Sects: Shaolin Temple, Wudang Sect, Emei Sect… masters of disciplined martial arts and internal Qi.

  • Demonic/Unorthodox Sects: Blood Cult, Five Poisons Cult… dangerous and often forbidden arts.

  • Clans & Martial Families: Signature techniques, weapons, or strategies. Example: Namgung Clan excels in swordsmanship; Sichuan Tang Clan specializes in poisons.

🌌 Murim Cultivation — Realms, Lifespan & Subrealms

────────────────────

• Mortal

Lifespan: 60–80 years

Subrealms: N/A

• Body Refinement (Shinyeongyeong)

Lifespan: ~150 years

Subrealms: Foundation → Bone → Marrow

• Body Tempering (Checheongyeong)

Lifespan: ~250 years

Subrealms: Early → Mid → Late

• Qi Awakening (Gicheongyeong)

Lifespan: ~400 years

Subrealms: 1st Vein → 6th Vein

• Core Formation (Danjeongyeong)

Lifespan: ~600 years
